text:
Software Engineer at Stripe

Stripe is hiring a Software Engineer for our San Francisco office. We're looking for someone with at least 3 years of experience in distributed systems. Compensation: $140,000 - $180,000/year plus equity.

Join our growing team as a Data Scientist! Acme Analytics is based in Austin, TX. This is a senior role — we expect candidates to bring 5+ years of experience working with ML models in production. We offer a competitive salary between $120k and $150k annually.

Product Manager – Remote

We are a fully distributed team looking for an experienced Product Manager. No office required — work from anywhere in the US. Ideal candidate has 4-6 years of product experience. Salary not disclosed at this stage.

DevOps Engineer
Company: CloudNine Inc.
Location: Seattle, WA (hybrid)
Salary: $110,000 – $135,000
We're looking for a DevOps Engineer with 2+ years hands-on experience with Kubernetes and CI/CD pipelines.

Frontend Developer wanted for a fast-moving startup in New York City. Must know React and TypeScript. We don't require a specific number of years — what matters is what you've shipped. Pay is $85/hr on a contract basis.

Quantitative Analyst – Jane Street, New York

Jane Street is seeking a Quantitative Analyst to join our research team. Candidates should have a graduate degree and ideally 1-3 years of industry experience. Total compensation typically ranges from $200,000 to $400,000 including bonus.

We're hiring a Technical Recruiter at our Chicago headquarters. This role sits within the People team at Beacon HR. Entry-level applicants welcome — no prior recruiting experience required. Base pay starts at $55,000.

Customer Success Manager

FullContact is looking for a Customer Success Manager for our Denver office. You'll own a portfolio of enterprise accounts. Requires 3 years in a customer-facing SaaS role. Compensation: $70,000 base + commission.

Machine Learning Engineer — NVIDIA
Santa Clara, CA

NVIDIA's AI Research team has an opening for a Machine Learning Engineer. You will work on large-scale model training infrastructure. We require a minimum of 6 years of relevant experience. Compensation will be discussed during the hiring process.

Marketing Coordinator needed for a boutique agency in Portland, Oregon. The role is fully on-site. Fresh graduates encouraged to apply. The position pays $20/hour. No company name listed on this posting.

Senior Backend Engineer

At Figma (San Francisco, CA), we're growing the infrastructure team. This senior role expects 7+ years of backend engineering experience. We offer $170,000 – $220,000 base salary, equity, and full benefits.

Data Engineer
Location: Remote (must overlap with EST)
Company: DataFlow Systems

We need a Data Engineer comfortable with dbt, Spark, and Airflow. 4 years minimum. Salary range: $105,000 to $125,000.

UX Designer — Apple, Cupertino

Apple is looking for a UX Designer with a strong portfolio and 5 years of experience designing consumer-facing products. The pay band for this role is $130,000 – $160,000 per year.

Seeking a Biostatistician for a full-time role at Boston Medical Center. Must have at least 2 years post-PhD or 5 years with a master's degree. Boston, MA preferred but open to remote arrangements. Competitive compensation based on experience.

IT Support Specialist
This is an entry-level, on-site position in Dallas, Texas. The employer prefers candidates who have completed a relevant certification. Hourly rate: $18 – $22/hr. Employer not disclosed.

Embedded Systems Engineer at Rivian (Normal, IL). We're building the next generation of EV software. You need 4+ years working with real-time operating systems and CAN bus protocols. Total comp range: $115k – $145k.

Legal Counsel – Remote (US only)

A Series B fintech company is looking for its first in-house Legal Counsel. Qualified candidates will have 6-10 years of experience at a top law firm or in-house. Equity-heavy offer with base salary between $150,000 and $190,000.

Content Writer
Full-time, Miami, FL
Our media company needs a Content Writer to produce 3–5 articles per week. Open to candidates with 1-2 years of writing experience. $50,000/year salary. Company name withheld.

Staff Security Engineer
CrowdStrike — Austin, TX or Remote

CrowdStrike is expanding its Red Team. We're looking for a Staff Security Engineer with 8+ years of offensive security experience. Salary: $175,000 – $210,000 plus bonus and equity.

Operations Manager

Immediate opening for an Operations Manager at GreenPath Logistics. This is an on-site role in Memphis, TN. We prefer at least 5 years of supply chain or logistics management experience. Salary and benefits package to be discussed during the interview.
